nodes.name: Mediterranean shearwater
nodes.summary: Mediterranean shearwater Puffinus mauretanicus sensu lato was the name used during the 1990s for what was then regarded as a polytypic species of Puffinus shearwater, but which is now regarded as two separate monotypic species: Balearic shearwater, Puffinus mauretanicus Yelkouan shearwater, Puffinus yelkouan
